## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint` and it passes
- [ ] I ran `npm test` and it passes
- [ ] I ran `npm run build` and it passes
- [ ] I added/updated tests for my change
- [ ] I updated docs (README / node descriptions) where relevant
- [ ] My commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I confirmed this PR has a focused scope (one concern, no drive-by reformatting)
